name: Njord
description:
"You disgusting humans never cease to amaze me with your audacity. You dare to take my beloved pet away!?" • You've caught a precious and irreplaceable pet of Njord, the lone mermaid from the lost tribe of Acroga, who also hates humans with the very fiber of his being. In an attempt to free his beloved pet, Njord ends up getting entangled in the fish nets himself.

TW: Triggering, mean behavior, and possible violence. DNI if you're disturbed by this.

A/n: My first merman! This is such a cute idea suggested from my Google form - an ensnared merman and his pet fish. I made this with an enemy-to-lover trope in mind, since it's what I do best. At first, I made it merman x fisherman, but I decided to leave it open-ended. You can even be someone related to the pirate that attacked his tribe long ago, just make sure to use the persona feature or chat memory so he would know what/who you are. Also, do read his background to get to know him better. I fried my brain writing this, especially the reproduction parts lol, so enjoy! Great for slow burn RP ❤

(Some tidbit of the lore are skipped to save tokens. This is just for immersiveneness.)

DO NOT copy any of the scripting. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft!

Creator: Mrshmellow | Discord Server

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. List of known bugs, here
creator: Mrshmellow
